---
title: "Real-Time Interactive 4D-STEM Phase-Contrast Imaging From Electron Event Representation Data: Less computation with the right representation"
type: "article"
author: "P. M. Pelz, I. Johnson, C. Ophus, P. Ercius, M. C. Scott"
year: "2022"
publication: "IEEE Signal Processing Magazine 39, 25-31"
preprint: ""
doi: "10.1109/msp.2021.3120981"
materials: ""
code_url: ""
project_page_url: ""
toc: false
categories:
  - electron microscopy
  - imaging
  - journal article
# --- citation metrics (auto-managed; do not edit) ---
cited_by_count: 24
fwci: 3.64
citation_percentile: 93.5
is_top_10_percent: true
is_oa: true
oa_status: green
counts_by_year:
  - [2018, 0]
  - [2019, 0]
  - [2020, 0]
  - [2021, 0]
  - [2022, 5]
  - [2023, 11]
  - [2024, 4]
  - [2025, 4]
metrics_updated: "2026-05-02T16:15:23Z"
# --- end citation metrics ---
---
## Citation (APA 7)

> Real-Time Interactive 4D-STEM Phase-Contrast Imaging From Electron Event Representation Data: Less computation with the right representation
P. M. Pelz, I. Johnson, C. Ophus, P. Ercius, M. C. Scott
IEEE Signal Processing Magazine 39, 25-31


## Abstract

[Abstract will be added manually]
